title: gomphandra andamanica
intro: Gomphandra andamanica, a species of flowering plant in the family Stemonuraceae, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Andaman and Nicobar Islands. The medicinal properties of Gomphandra andamanica lie in its leaves, which contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. The health benefits of Gomphandra andamanica include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections. Gomphandra andamanica can be prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
